---
name: New Compliance Check
about: Suggest a new compliance check to add
title: "[CHECK] "
labels: compliance-check
assignees: ''
---

## EU AI Act reference
Which article(s) does this check relate to? (e.g., Article 9 - Risk Management, Article 15 - Accuracy)

## What should the check detect?
Describe the code pattern, configuration, or behavior this check should flag.

## Pass / Fail criteria
- **Pass**: What does compliant code look like?
- **Fail**: What does non-compliant code look like?

## Example code
```python
# Example of code that should trigger this check
```

## Severity suggestion
- [ ] Fail (hard requirement)
- [ ] Warning (recommended practice)
- [ ] Info (best practice)
